18.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

18.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
18.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

18.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
18.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

18.gl: a brother (used in the widest sense of literal relationship and metaphorical affinity or resemblance (like father))
18.kj: another, brother(-ly); kindred, like, other. Compare also the proper names beginning with 'Ah-' or 'Ahi-'.

18.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
18.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
18.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

18.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

19.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
19.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
19.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

19.gl: properly, dark (as enveloped), i.e. the north; hence (by orientation), the left hand
19.dv: or שְׂמֹאל; a primitive word (rather perhaps from the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה) (by insertion of the aleph) through the idea of wrapping up);

19.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

19.gl: to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively)
19.kj: have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of.

19.gl: the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg; figuratively, force
19.kj: arm, [phrase] help, mighty, power, shoulder, strength.
19.dv: or (shortened) זְרֹעַ; and (feminine) זְרוֹעָה; or זְרֹעָה; from H2232 (זָרַע);

19.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
19.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.
